name: I Am Hall Security
author: Poki
description: I Am Hall Security is a 3D game where you play as the new hall monitor in a school full of chaos! Patrol the halls, catch sneaky troublemakers, scan students, check their belongings, and approve or bust them as needed. With lazy teachers and weird events popping up everywhere, it’s up to you to keep order. Think you can handle the madness and keep the school under control? How to play I Am Hall Security? Click or tap to make the choice. Press the according buttons or keys to interact. Who created I Am Hall Security? I Am Hall Security is created by GeniGames. Play their other games on Poki: Flying Wheels Evolution and Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot ! How can I play I Am Hall Security for free? You can play I Am Hall Security for free on Poki. Can I play I Am Hall Security on mobile devices and desktop? I Am Hall Security can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
